title: The Foxian Modpack 2
description: The sequel for the original Foxian modpack updated to 1.21.1 with a much larger focus on exploration
body:
## A fun modpack based around exploration and playing with friends!

**The Foxian Modpack 2 is a 1.21.1 sequel to the 1.20.1 modpack [The Foxian modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-foxian-modpack), however this sequel is much more focused on exploration and adventure with friends.**

### Features
- **Exploration** - Mods to encourage exploration like _Simply swords, Cataclysm, and Enderscapes_
- **Create** - Create V6 Alongside addons like _Numbristics, Bitterballen and Garnished_
- **Decoration** - Mods adding Decorations like Beautify, Handcrafted, all of the Macaw's mods and more_
- **Multiplayer** - A focus on improving the multiplayer experience like _Simple voice chat, emotecraft and Lootr_
- **Magic** - Mods focusing on magic like _Ars Noveau and Occultism_
- **Overhaul mods** - Mods like _Better combat, Better Archeology and Do a barrel roll to overhaul certain parts of the base game_
